last_prompt: Add tests for the multi-repository orchestration feature. In cli/src/ or a test module, write tests using temporary directories to verify: (1) when `work_dirs` maps a task id to a secondary path, the agent receives the correct work_dir for that task while other tasks use the default, (2) git commits are made to the correct repository (not the default one) when a task is mapped to a different path, (3) when `work_dirs` is empty or absent, behavior is identical to the current single-repo behavior. Run `cargo test` to confirm all tests pass.
